initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Burlington
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective fostering food security and community solidarity through direct action in Burlington. They coordinate free food distribution, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through food justice, anti-militarism, and creating spaces for sustainable food access and community care.

initiatives.name: Peace & Justice Center
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through education, advocacy, and activism in Burlington. They coordinate political education, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through human rights advocacy, economic justice, and environmental justice initiatives. Their work emphasizes creating spaces for movement building and meaningful peace within and beyond Vermont.

initiatives.name: Streets CATS Burlington
initiatives.description: The Street Community Action Team of Burlington is dedicated to supporting our unhoused community one connection at a time.

initiatives.name: Burlington Tenants United
initiatives.description: Working towards a world where housing isn't a commodity, where we all have a safe and comfortable place to live! Building tenant power together.

initiatives.name: BTV Copwatch
initiatives.description: We film the cops for community self-defense in Burlington, VT. In partnership with Food Not Bombs.

initiatives.name: People's Kitchen VT
initiatives.description: Feed the Revolution. Free food, free people. A tasty meal regardless of ability to pay.

initiatives.name: Free Her VT
initiatives.description: FreeHerVT is rooted in local organizing/advocacy to end the incarceration of women, girls, trans, and non-binary folk & closing women's jails/prisons.
